FILRODENSHEX.UI.Stage1Hint: Generate the foundational heightmap. This calculates the mathematical noise used to define continental shapes, oceans, and mountain peaks.
FILRODENSHEX.UI.SaveMapHint: Saves the current map data to a compendium entry. This includes all hex data, biome assignments, and configuration settings. The map can be reloaded later for further editing or export.
FILRODENSHEX.UI.NoMapsSaved: No saved maps found in the compendium.
FILRODENSHEX.Legend.Title: Biomes
FILRODENSHEX.Settings.ExportPath.Name: Map Export Directory
FILRODENSHEX.Settings.ExportPath.Hint: The server directory where WEBP versions of the maps will be automatically saved when exiting the editor.
FILRODENSHEX.Warnings.InvalidGridType: Hex Crafter requires a Hexagonal grid. Please update your Scene Configuration.
FILRODENSHEX.Notifications.LoadFailed: Failed to load map data from compendium.
